name: Bachelor Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 3 pound boneless venison, elk, moose or beef chuck roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 1/4 inch pieces.
2. In a 4-quart Dutch oven, brown the meat in oil over medium heat; use a slotted spoon to remove and set aside.
3. In the same pan, saut onions, green pepper, garlic, and red pepper flakes until vegetables are tender.
4. Return the meat to the pan and stir in the remaining ingredients.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and cover.
6. Simmer for 3 hours or until the meat is tender.
